name: Chickpeas with Tomatoes and Rice
recipeIngredient: Salt, pepper, and other seasonings to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion in oil until translucent.
2. Add the garlic (if using) and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
3. Stir in the tomatoes and simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
4. Mix in the garbanzos, rice, salt, pepper, and other seasonings.
5. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes until the rice is tender and all flavors are well combined.
